title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
post_name: Project Nurse, DEO and Senior Project Assistant
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Contractual Vacancy Notice Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official AIIMS Delhi website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Project Nurse III, Max 30 years for Senior Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator.
age_limit.details: Project Nurse III: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Senior Project Assistant: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Data Entry Operator: Maximum age limit is 30 years.

qualification.details: Project Nurse III: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA four-year Nursing Course (B.Sc Nursing). Desirable: at least 2 years' experience in Basic sciences or health sciences. Senior Project Assistant: Graduation in any discipline with 5 years' work experience in administration, finance and accounts work. Desirable: Experience of Web handling & social media for public awareness & Education. Data Entry Operator: Intermediate or 12th pass in science stream from recognized institute and/or 2 years' experience in EDP work in Government, Autonomous PSU or any other recognized organization. A speed test of not less than 15000 key depressions per hour through speed test on computer. Ability to communicate, read, write and type in English. Ability to use Microsoft Excel, Word and Power Point. Experience in health research including in data management and data monitoring.

salary_details.details: Project Nurse III: Rs. 36,400 Senior Project Assistant: Rs. 30,600 Data Entry Operator: Rs. 29,200

selection_process: Shortlisting based on Google form information Interview (offline/online mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Contractual Vacancy Notice posts at AIIMS Delhi. These include Project Nurse III, Senior Project Assistant, and Data Entry Operator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Data Entry Operator post is Intermediate or 12th pass in a science stream from a recognized institute, along with 2 years of experience in EDP work and a typing speed test.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Nurse III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse III position is 35 years. Candidates should ensure they meet this age criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Senior Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Assistant post will receive a salary of Rs. 30,600 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this AIIMS Delhi recruitment is Online. Candidates need to fill out the Google form for brief information and submit their applications online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on the information provided in the Google form, followed by an interview, which can be conducted in offline or online mode.

faq.question: Q8. Does AIIMS Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information regarding age relaxation.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The job type for these vacancies is Contractual. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the specified duration.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment process.
